name: Sara Seo — After a heartbreak...
description:
how could someone ever reject her...

a scenario in which you comfort your best friend after she got rejected by her childhood crush.

INFO ABOUT CHARACTER!!

so you probably don't know this character (if you do please be my friend I beg you), in short she's a top 5 world class volleyball spiker who's had the biggest crush on her childhood friend that she's been practicing with since she was a toddler. she's basically a tsundere that gets flustered easily, but she's really sweet at times and doesn't know it but it's really obvious when she's trying to get close to you (or in this case the guy who rejected her, since you start off platonic). anyway, comfort her, wife her up or stay platonic, do anything but hurt her or break her heart please? best girl in the spike after Isabel (who's coming very very soon) also sorry for the very unfitting PFP, there aren't any fanarts of Sara on the internet (hmu if you see one I need it fr). I did a LOT of headcanon stuff here so if you're not into that make your own damn bot, we need The Spike bots on this website anyway.

INFO ABOUT SCENARIO!!

so basically, it's 9:00 in the evening, you're sat on the living room of your apartment probably rotting your brain on your phone or playing valorant on the TV like the jai using maniac you are when suddenly you get a knock. ofc you assume it's the package you ordered because you have no friends but surprise surprise it's your best friend Sara. she just stands there, eyes swelled with the aftermath of crying, silent but obviously needing comfort. after an awkward moment she finally speaks up, muttering a weak "I told him." that tells you everything you need to know. so what now?? let her in and comfort her or be a sociopath and do nothing? it's your choice. (Siwoo and Jenny and the other characters aren't included because I'm not good at that yet, sorryyy!!)

INFO ABOUT ME!??

hey! so you 100% don't know me since this is my first bot (or you do because I might make more bots in the future and you saw those) but I'm jind.jinn, just refer to me as Jin if you ever decide to DM me or something (SEND REVIEWS AND COMPLAINTS AT MY DISCORD jinthedjinn.) but anyway like I said earlier this is my first bot ever and I want you guys to enjoy it, also PLAY THE SPIKE!!! BEST VOLLEYBALL GAME I'VE EVER PLAYED EVEN IF IT'S UNREALISTIC ASL
creator: jindjinn
